storyBeat: 和尚 Sanzang — 一個安靜會讀書的人

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 monk = 和尚
🔑 temple = 寺廟
🔑 read = 讀
🔑 quiet = 安靜的
記好了，奶奶開始說故事囉！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, a young monk named 三藏 (Sanzang) lived in a quiet temple.
questions.explanationZh: 很久很久以前，在中國有個安靜的寺廟，住著一個叫三藏的年輕和尚。一個人讀書、一個人想事情。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He read holy books every day, from morning until late at night.
questions.explanationZh: 從早讀到深夜——他不是在讀，是在跟書說話。奶奶說，這叫「把書讀進心裡去」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He did not like loud talk or big parties.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang a quiet kind of person?
questions.explanationZh: 不喜歡吵鬧大派對 → 當然是安靜的人，答 Yes。三藏就是這樣的人。
questions.sentenceZh: 他不喜歡嘈雜的交談，也不喜歡熱鬧的宴席。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His heart was soft. He cared about people he had never met.
questions.explanationZh: 他的心很軟——連沒見過的人也放在心上。這樣的人，很難不喜歡他。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang spent each day with books and tea, and slept on a thin mat.
questions.question: How did Sanzang live every day?
options: on a fast horse all day
questions.explanationZh: 書、茶、薄草蓆——這就是他的全部。「簡單的東西和讀書」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏每天與書和茶為伴，睡在一張薄薄的蓆子上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But the books in his temple were old and not enough.
questions.explanationZh: 寺廟裡的書又舊又少，讀完了就沒了。他的心開始往外望——往更遠的地方。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He felt there was much more to learn far, far away.
questions.question: What did Sanzang feel about his learning?
options: there was still much more to know
he had learned all he needed
questions.explanationZh: 「遠方還有很多要學的。」他感覺得到自己的書本還不夠——「還有很多要知道的」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他感覺，在很遠很遠的地方，還有更多東西等著他去學。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sometimes he stood by the gate and looked toward the west.
questions.explanationZh: 有時候他站在寺門口，望著西邊的天空，眼神裡有一種說不清楚的渴望。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel standing by the gate?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 望向遠方、想學更多 → 「準備好迎接新東西」。那個 🌅 剛好是他的感覺。
questions.sentenceZh: 站在城門邊，三藏心裡在想什麼？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One morning, a man in fine yellow clothes came to the temple door...
questions.explanationZh: 一個早晨，一個穿黃色華服的人來到寺門口……奶奶說，有些人的出現，會改變你的一生。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, a young monk named 三藏 (Sanzang) lived in a quiet temple.
questions.question: What does this sentence tell us about Sanzang?
options: a soldier who guarded the city wall
an old farmer who owned a big field
a young monk who lived alone in peace
a boy who ran away from his family
optionsZh: 一個擁有大農田的老農夫
一個在寺廟裡安靜生活的年輕和尚
questions.explanationZh: 「young monk in a quiet temple」——年輕和尚、安靜寺廟。「一個在寺廟裡安靜生活的年輕和尚」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 很久以前，中國有個年輕的和尚，叫三藏，住在安靜的寺廟裡。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He did not like loud talk or big parties.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang prefer quiet over noise?
questions.explanationZh: 不喜歡吵鬧和大派對——這說明他偏好安靜，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他不喜歡嘈雜的交談，也不喜歡熱鬧的宴席。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 monk = 和尚
🔑 quiet = 安靜的
🔑 holy book = 聖書
🔑 west = 西方
三藏的故事關鍵字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His heart was soft. He cared about people he had never met.
questions.question: What does this tell us about Sanzang's character?
options: someone who never wanted any friends
someone who only cared about himself
a man who was afraid of strangers
a kind person who thought of others
optionsZh: 一個關心他人的善良人
questions.explanationZh: 「heart was soft」「cared about people he had never met」——關心素不相識的人，是「關心他人的善良人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的心很軟，連沒見過的人也放在心上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He read holy books every day, from morning until late ___ night.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 「late at night」是固定片語，表示「深夜」——填 at 才正確。
questions.sentenceZh: 他每天讀聖書，從早讀到深___。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But the books in his temple were old and not enough.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang have all the books he wanted at his temple?
questions.explanationZh: 「old and not enough」——舊的又不夠，他沒有足夠的書，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他寺廟裡的書又舊又不夠。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sometimes he stood by the gate and looked toward the west.
questions.question: What does Sanzang looking west most likely show?
options: checking the weather before going out
a longing for something far and beyond
watching for enemies near the gate
waiting for his friends to arrive
questions.explanationZh: 站在門口望著西邊——不是看天氣也不是等人，是心裡對遠方的「渴望」。
questions.sentenceZh: 有時他站在寺門口，望著西方的天空。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang read books alone, slept on a thin mat, and longed for more learning.
questions.question: Which best shows his life?
questions.explanationZh: 書、薄草蓆、渴望學更多——「安靜地讀書學習」那個 📚 最像三藏。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏一個人讀書，睡薄蓆，渴望更多知識。

storyBeat: 皇帝的請求 — 去西方拿回真經

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 emperor = 皇帝
🔑 ask = 請求
🔑 west = 西方
🔑 holy book = 經書
記好了，重要的任務來了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The man said, "The 皇帝 (Emperor) wants to see you at his palace."
questions.explanationZh: 「皇帝想見你。」——奶奶說，穿黃衣服的人來叫你，不是小事。三藏的人生要轉彎了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang put on his clean robe and went without saying no.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang turn down the invitation?
questions.explanationZh: 他穿上乾淨的袈裟，沒說「不去」，就去了——他沒拒絕，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏整理好袈裟，沒有說不，就出發了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At the palace, the Emperor sat on a tall chair and looked tired.
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝高坐在大椅子上，臉上帶著疲倦。連皇帝也有煩惱的時候。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My people need new holy books from India. Will you go?" he asked.
questions.question: What did the Emperor want Sanzang to do?
options: stay in the city as a teacher
build a new wall by the river
travel far and bring back books
questions.explanationZh: 「去印度，把真正的經書帶回來。」——「走遠路把書帶回來」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我的子民需要從印度取回的聖典，你願意去嗎？」他問。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knew the road was long. He knew it could take many years.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏心裡明白，這條路很遠、可能要走很多年——他沒騙自己。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But he bowed and said, "I will go. I will not come back empty."
questions.question: What did Sanzang promise the Emperor?
options: to bring the holy books home
to come back a very rich man
questions.explanationZh: 「我去。我不會空手回來。」——「把經書帶回家」就是他的承諾。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他鞠了一個躬說：「我願意去，不取得真經決不回頭。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor stood up and gave Sanzang a soft yellow scarf.
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝站起來，把一條柔軟的黃色圍巾給了他。這不只是禮物，是一份心意。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, you are my brother of the road," the Emperor said.
questions.questionEn: Did the Emperor treat Sanzang as someone very close?
questions.explanationZh: 「從今天起，你是我路上的兄弟。」——皇帝把他當最親近的人，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 「從今天起，你是我路上的兄弟。」皇帝說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel after the Emperor's words?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝叫他「兄弟」→ 受到尊重，他認真起來了。「受到尊重，認真起來」就是他的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝說完那番話，三藏心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: That night, Sanzang sat in his room and packed a very small bag...
questions.explanationZh: 那天晚上，他一個人坐在房裡，打包了一個非常小的包……奶奶說，有時候最重要的旅行，從一個小包開始。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang put on his clean robe and went without saying no.
questions.question: What does this tell us about Sanzang?
options: slow and reluctant to leave his books
angry and upset about being called
obedient and ready to serve others
afraid and hiding inside the temple
questions.explanationZh: 穿好衣服、沒說不——「順從、樂意服務他人」就是他的表現。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏穿上乾淨的袈裟，沒有推辭就去了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knew the road was long. He knew it could take many years.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang unaware of how hard the journey would be?
questions.explanationZh: 他知道路很長、可能要花幾年——他完全清楚旅途的艱難，答 No（他不是不知道）。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏知道路很漫長，知道可能要花好幾年。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 emperor = 皇帝
🔑 palace = 皇宮
🔑 India = 印度
🔑 empty-handed = 空手
皇帝見面節的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My people need new holy books from India. Will you go?" he asked.
questions.question: Why did the Emperor ask Sanzang to go?
options: India was only a few days from the palace
Sanzang had argued with the palace monks
the Emperor wanted Sanzang far away
the people needed holy books from a far land
optionsZh: 印度距皇宮只有幾天路
三藏和宮廷和尚起了爭執
人民需要從遠方帶回聖書
questions.explanationZh: 「My people need new holy books」——人民需要聖書，所以叫他去取。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我的子民需要從印度取回新的聖書，你願意去嗎？」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But he bowed and said, "I will go. I will not ___ back empty."
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 「will not + 動詞原形」——「will not come back」才是正確的否定未來式。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他鞠躬說：「我會去。我不會___空手回來。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor stood up and gave Sanzang a soft yellow scarf.
questions.questionEn: Did the Emperor show respect toward Sanzang?
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝站起身、親自送黃巾——這是對三藏表示尊敬，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝站了起來，送給三藏一條柔軟的黃色圍巾。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, you are my brother of the road," the Emperor said.
questions.question: What did the Emperor mean by these words?
options: asking Sanzang to stay inside the palace
treating Sanzang like a trusted companion
telling Sanzang the trip was not important
warning Sanzang never to return at all
optionsZh: 把三藏當作信任的伴侶
告訴三藏這次旅程不重要
警告三藏永遠不要回來
questions.explanationZh: 「brother of the road」——路上的兄弟，就是把他當作信任的同伴。
questions.sentenceZh: 「從今天起，你是我路上的兄弟。」皇帝說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang bowed to the Emperor and agreed to go, even knowing the long road ahead.
questions.question: Which best shows Sanzang's choice?
options: 😡 arguing back loudly at the palace
🏃 running away from the palace fast
optionsZh: 帶著勇氣和尊重接受任務
questions.explanationZh: 他鞠躬、答應去——「帶著勇氣和尊重接受任務」，那個 🙏 最像他。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏向皇帝鞠躬，同意出發，就算知道前方路途漫長。

storyBeat: 從長安出發 — 一匹馬,一個小包

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 horse = 馬
🔑 bag = 包
🔑 leave = 離開
🔑 city gate = 城門
今天要出發了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At sunrise, Sanzang stood at the city gate of 長安 (Chang'an).
questions.explanationZh: 天剛亮，三藏已經站在長安的城門口了。城市還在沉睡，他要出發去很遠的地方。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had one brown horse and one small bag on his back.
questions.question: How much did Sanzang carry?
options: only a horse and a tiny bag
questions.explanationZh: 一匹馬、一個小包——他沒帶多餘的東西。「只有一匹馬和小包」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他只有一匹棕馬和一個小包袱。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Many people waved goodbye, but he did not bring even one friend.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang starting this long trip alone?
questions.explanationZh: 很多人揮手說再見，但他沒帶半個朋友——他一個人出發，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 很多人揮手送別，但他連一個朋友都沒帶。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor poured a cup of clear water from the city's earth.
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝從城裡的泥土舀了一杯清水，給他帶走。這杯水不是用來喝的，是用來記住的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Drink this. Remember the dust of your home," he said softly.
questions.question: Why did the Emperor give the water?
options: so he would remember his country
so Sanzang would not get lost
to make him sleep at night
to pay him for the trip
questions.explanationZh: 「喝了它，記住家鄉的泥土。」——「讓他記得自己的家鄉」就是這杯水的意思。
questions.sentenceZh: 「喝下這個，記住你家鄉的塵土。」他輕聲說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang drank it all. He bowed three times to the east.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏喝下這杯水，再向東邊鞠了三個躬。然後，轉身出發了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then he turned the horse to the west and walked out of the gate.
questions.explanationZh: 他把馬頭轉向西邊，走出城門。那一刻，背後是家，前面是未知。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Behind him, the city walls grew small in the morning light.
questions.question: What happened as Sanzang walked away?
options: his home looked smaller and smaller
the sky turned dark and rainy
his horse turned and ran back home
questions.explanationZh: 城牆越來越小，越來越遠——「看起來越來越小」就是答案，不是「越來越近」。
questions.sentenceZh: 身後，城牆在晨光裡越來越小。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel leaving his home behind?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 離開家很難，但他還是走了——「難過但勇敢」就是他的樣子。那個 🌗 最像他。
questions.sentenceZh: 離開家的那一刻，三藏心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Step by step, the road ahead opened up like a long brown river...
questions.explanationZh: 前面的路像一條長長的褐色河流——奶奶說，這樣的路，才叫做「真正的旅程」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had one brown horse and one small bag on his back.
questions.question: What does this show about Sanzang's journey?
options: taking two horses for the long road
bringing a large group of helpers
riding with lots of food and gold
questions.explanationZh: 一匹馬、一個小包——他的行李極少，「帶著極少的行李出發」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他只有一匹棕馬和背上一個小包。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Many people waved goodbye, but he did not bring even one friend.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang traveling with companions from the start?
questions.explanationZh: 很多人揮手送行，但他一個朋友都沒帶——他是獨自出發的，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 很多人揮手送別，但他一個朋友也沒帶上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 sunrise = 日出
🔑 city gate = 城門
🔑 earth = 泥土
🔑 bow = 鞠躬
出發節的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor poured a cup of clear water from the city's earth.
questions.question: Why did the Emperor give Sanzang water from the city's earth?
options: so he would remember and love his home
because the road ahead had no water
to check if Sanzang was feeling well
as payment for taking on the journey
optionsZh: 讓他記住、愛護自己的家鄉
確認三藏身體是否健康
questions.explanationZh: 「記住家鄉的泥土」——喝一口家鄉的水，就是叫他記住、愛護家鄉。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝斟了一杯城市泥土沉澱的清水。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then he turned the horse to the west and ___ out of the gate.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 前面用了「turned」（過去式）——後面要用「walked」保持時態一致。
questions.sentenceZh: 然後他把馬頭轉向西方，___出了城門。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang drank it all. He bowed three times to the east.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang show respect for his homeland before leaving?
questions.explanationZh: 喝光水、向東方鞠躬三次——這是對家鄉表達尊重，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏喝光了它，向東方鞠了三次躬。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Behind him, the city walls grew small in the morning light.
questions.question: What does this image mostly show?
options: morning sunlight making the walls look brighter
the city walls being torn down by workers
Sanzang moving farther and farther from home
Sanzang looking back and turning around
optionsZh: 早晨陽光讓城牆看起來更亮
三藏越走越遠，離家越來越遠
三藏回頭、準備轉身回去
questions.explanationZh: 城牆越縮越小——這是他越走越遠的視角。「離家越來越遠」就是這畫面的意義。
questions.sentenceZh: 在他身後，城牆在晨光中越縮越小。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang left his home alone at sunrise, heading west with just a horse and a bag.
questions.question: Which best shows this moment?
options: 📚 reading books inside a warm room
questions.explanationZh: 日出時一個人上路——「獨自在黎明出發」，那個 🌅 最像這個時刻。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏在日出時獨自離家，只帶一匹馬和一個包，向西出發。

storyBeat: 走了好多天 — 沙漠、風、和孤單

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 desert = 沙漠
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 thirsty = 渴
🔑 lonely = 孤單
艱難的旅途要開始了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Day by day, Sanzang walked. The green hills became yellow sand.
questions.explanationZh: 一天天走著，綠色的山變成了黃色的沙。奶奶說，這種風景的改變，叫做「越走越荒涼」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind pushed dust into his eyes and into his mouth.
questions.question: What did the desert wind do to Sanzang?
questions.explanationZh: 風把沙吹進眼睛、吹進嘴巴——「把沙吹進他臉上」就是答案。沙漠的風不客氣。
questions.sentenceZh: 風把沙塵吹進他的眼睛和嘴裡。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He drank from his bottle in small careful sips.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang have a lot of water to spare?
questions.explanationZh: 他小心地一小口一小口喝——水不夠，他不敢大口喝。所以水不多，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他把水壺裡的水小口小口地喝。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At night, the desert was cold. He had only a thin blanket.
questions.explanationZh: 晚上，沙漠冷得讓人發抖，他只有一條薄毯子。冷呀，真的很冷。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had no friend to talk with. The stars were his only company.
questions.question: Who was with Sanzang at night?
options: no one, just the night sky
questions.explanationZh: 沒有朋友，只有星星陪他——「沒人，只有夜空」就是答案。星星是他的夜間伴侶。
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒有朋友可以說話，星星是他唯一的陪伴。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Some nights he closed his eyes and pictured his old temple.
questions.explanationZh: 閉上眼睛，腦中出現舊寺廟的樣子。那裡有他熟悉的氣味和聲音。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Each morning he woke up and walked on, even when his feet hurt.
questions.question: What did Sanzang do every morning?
questions.explanationZh: 腳痛還是繼續走——「繼續往西走」就是他每天早上做的事。腳痛了，心不能停。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早晨，就算腳在痛，他還是站起來繼續走。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The road did not end. Some days, it felt like the road never would.
questions.explanationZh: 路好像永遠走不完——有些日子，他真的這麼覺得。那種感覺很重。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel after so many days alone?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 孤單，但沒有停下——「孤單但沒停下」就是他走了好多天後的狀態。那個 😔 就是他。
questions.sentenceZh: 走了那麼多天的孤單路，三藏心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then one afternoon, far ahead, a huge dark shape rose from the sand...
questions.explanationZh: 遠方，有一個巨大黑色的形狀從沙地裡升起來……奶奶說，這種時候，故事就要有新的轉折了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Day by day, Sanzang walked. The green hills became yellow sand.
questions.question: What does this sentence show about the journey?
options: the land changed as he walked further west
rain turned the desert into green hills
Sanzang was going around in circles
yellow sand suddenly appeared near the city
optionsZh: 隨著他往西走，地貌越來越不同
雨水把沙漠變成了綠色山丘
黃沙突然出現在城市附近
questions.explanationZh: 綠山 → 黃沙——地形在改變，說明他越走越遠，「地貌越來越不同」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 一天又一天，三藏走著，綠色的山丘變成了黃色的沙。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had no friend to talk with. The stars were his only company.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang lonely on his journey?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有朋友說話、只有星星陪他——這是孤單的旅途，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒有朋友可以說話，星星是他唯一的伴。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 desert = 沙漠
🔑 blanket = 毛毯
🔑 bottle = 瓶子
🔑 alone = 孤單
沙漠旅途的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At night, the desert was cold. He had only a thin blanket.
questions.question: What does this show about conditions in the desert?
options: Sanzang brought too many warm clothes
nights were harsh and supplies were few
the desert stayed warm all through the night
cold nights were only at the start of the trip
optionsZh: 三藏帶了太多保暖衣物
只有旅途開始時才有冷夜
questions.explanationZh: 沙漠冷、只有薄毛毯——「夜晚嚴酷，補給品很少」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 夜晚，沙漠很冷，他只有一條薄薄的毛毯。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Each morning he woke up and ___ on, even when his feet hurt.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
optionsZh: 走（過去式，承接 woke up）
questions.explanationZh: 「woke up and walked on」——兩個過去式動詞並列，「walked」才對。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上他醒來，繼續___，就算腳很痛。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Some nights he closed his eyes and pictured his old temple.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang sometimes miss his home?
questions.explanationZh: 閉上眼睛、想著舊寺廟——這是在思念家，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 有些夜晚，他閉上眼睛，在腦海裡浮現舊寺廟的樣子。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The road did not end. Some days, it felt like the road never would.
questions.question: What does this sentence tell us about Sanzang's state of mind?
options: excited that the road kept going on
certain the trip would end in a few days
planning to turn and go home soon
beginning to feel the journey had no end
optionsZh: 對路還在繼續感到興奮
確定旅程再過幾天就結束
開始覺得旅途好像沒有盡頭
questions.explanationZh: 「road never would end」——覺得路永遠沒有終點，「開始覺得旅途沒有盡頭」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 路一直沒有盡頭，有些日子感覺路永遠不會終止。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Alone in the cold desert at night, Sanzang kept walking every morning.
questions.question: Which best shows his inner strength?
options: 😴 giving up for a long rest
questions.explanationZh: 冷、孤單、腳痛——每天還是繼續走，「在艱難中堅持前進」，那個 💪 最像三藏。
questions.sentenceZh: 在冷沙漠裡一個人，三藏每天早上還是繼續走。

storyBeat: 巨大的山 — 一個聲音在叫他

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 mountain = 山
🔑 voice = 聲音
🔑 call = 叫
🔑 huge = 巨大的
準備好迎接驚喜了嗎？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang came close to a huge mountain named 五行山 (Five Phases).
questions.explanationZh: 三藏走近五行山——那是一座很大很大的山，大到讓人站在它面前覺得自己很小。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Five tall stone fingers rose into the sky like a giant hand.
questions.question: What did the mountain look like?
questions.explanationZh: 五根石頭高柱，像一隻巨人的手伸向天空——「石頭的巨人手」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 五根高高的石柱衝向天空，像一隻巨人的手。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His horse stopped and would not move. Its ears went flat.
questions.explanationZh: 他的馬停住，耳朵貼平，腳不肯動——馬感覺到了什麼，一動也不動。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind around the mountain was very still and very strange.
questions.questionEn: Did the place feel like an ordinary spot?
questions.explanationZh: 風很靜、很怪——不是普通地方該有的感覺。這裡絕對不是普通的地方，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 山周圍的風又靜又奇怪。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then a deep voice came from under the rocks. "Master! Master!"
questions.explanationZh: 「師父！師父！」——岩石下傳來的聲音，低沉而清晰。三藏嚇了一跳。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang looked all around but saw no person near the path.
questions.question: What did Sanzang notice about the voice?
options: no one could be seen there
questions.explanationZh: 他四處張望，什麼人都看不到——「看不到那邊有人」就是他發現的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏四處張望，路旁沒有半個人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I am under the mountain! Please come close!" the voice called again.
questions.explanationZh: 「我在山下！請靠近！」——那聲音又叫了一次，帶著急切。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang took a slow breath. He stepped closer to the cold stone.
questions.question: How did Sanzang move toward the voice?
questions.explanationZh: 他慢慢吸一口氣，小心地往石頭靠近——「慢慢小心地走」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏慢慢深吸一口氣，踏近了那片冰冷的石頭。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel about the strange voice?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 「小心又好奇」——那個聲音好奇怪，他想知道是誰，但也要小心。那個 👂 就是他的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 對那個奇怪的聲音，三藏有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Between two huge rocks, two bright eyes blinked up at him...
questions.explanationZh: 兩塊巨石之間，兩顆亮眼睛眨巴眨巴地看著他……奶奶說，這雙眼睛，是整個故事的關鍵。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang came close to a huge mountain named 五行山 (Five Phases).
questions.question: What happened as Sanzang neared the mountain?
options: the road became smooth and easy
more travellers joined him on the path
his horse ran ahead without him
optionsZh: 某件奇怪的事引起了他的注意
更多旅人在路上加入了他
questions.explanationZh: 馬停下不走了、奇怪聲音出現——他接近大山時發生了奇怪的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏走近一座叫五行山的巨山。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His horse stopped and would not move. Its ears went flat.
questions.questionEn: Was the horse calm and relaxed near the mountain?
questions.explanationZh: 馬停下不走、耳朵貼平——這是馬緊張、害怕的表現，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的馬停下來，不肯走了，耳朵貼平。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 huge = 巨大的
🔑 rock = 石頭
🔑 voice = 聲音
🔑 come close = 靠近
五行山節的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then a deep voice came from under the rocks. "Master! Master!"
questions.question: What was strange about the voice?
options: heard only by the horse but not Sanzang
speaking in a very soft and tiny sound
coming from deep under the heavy rocks
coming from the top of a tall tree nearby
optionsZh: 只有馬聽見，三藏沒聽到
從沉重的石頭下面傳出來
questions.explanationZh: 「from under the rocks」——聲音從石頭下面傳來，這才是奇怪的地方。
questions.sentenceZh: 接著一個低沉的聲音從石頭下面傳來：「師父！師父！」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang took a slow breath. He ___ closer to the cold stone.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 「took」是過去式——後面的「stepped」也用過去式，才能保持一致。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏緩緩吸了一口氣，___近那塊冷冷的石頭。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang looked all around but saw no person near the path.
questions.questionEn: Could Sanzang see who was calling him?
questions.explanationZh: 他四處張望，卻沒有看到任何人——他看不到那個叫他的人，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏四處張望，但在小徑附近沒看見任何人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind around the mountain was very still and very strange.
questions.question: What does the stillness of the wind tell us?
options: something unusual was happening at that place
the weather was perfect for a picnic there
no wind meant the mountain was safe
Sanzang had arrived before the storm
optionsZh: 那個地方正在發生不尋常的事
天氣非常適合在那裡野餐
questions.explanationZh: 「very still and very strange」——異常寧靜，這樣的氣氛暗示「有不尋常的事在發生」。
questions.sentenceZh: 山周圍的風非常靜止，非常奇怪。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A voice called from under the rocks. Sanzang's horse would not move.
questions.question: Which best shows the mood here?
optionsZh: 一個讓大家開心的驚喜
questions.explanationZh: 石頭下有聲音、馬不肯走——「有些詭異、難以解釋」，那個 😨 最像這個時刻的氣氛。
questions.sentenceZh: 石頭下傳來聲音，三藏的馬不肯走。

storyBeat: 石下的猴子 — 被壓 500 年了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 monkey = 猴子
🔑 stone = 石頭
🔑 under = 下面
🔑 locked = 鎖住的
謎底要揭開了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Under the rocks was a small monkey with a brown face and gold eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 石頭下面有一隻猴子——棕色的臉，金色的眼睛，雖然被壓著，眼神卻閃亮亮的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Only his head and one arm could move from the heavy stone.
questions.question: How much of the monkey could move?
options: only his head and one arm
questions.explanationZh: 只有頭和一隻手能動——「只有頭和一隻手」就是答案。被大石頭壓著，動也動不了。
questions.sentenceZh: 只有腦袋和一隻手臂能在厚重的石頭下動彈。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He smiled at Sanzang, but he could not even sit up.
questions.questionEn: Was the monkey held there by the mountain?
questions.explanationZh: 他對三藏笑，但連坐起來都沒辦法——大山把他牢牢壓住了，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他對三藏笑了笑，但連坐起來都做不到。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I have been locked here for five hundred years," the monkey said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我被鎖在這裡五百年了。」——五百年！比奶奶的奶奶的奶奶的奶奶還要久。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang's eyes grew wide. Five hundred years was so very long.
questions.question: How did Sanzang feel about the time?
options: thought it was a short stay
was surprised by a long, long time
optionsZh: 對非常久的時間感到驚訝
questions.explanationZh: 三藏瞪大眼睛——五百年真的太久了。「對非常久的時間感到驚訝」就是他的反應。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏的眼睛睜大了。五百年，太久太久了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Long ago, I was loud and proud. The sky god put me here," he added.
questions.explanationZh: 「以前我太吵太驕傲，天神把我關在這裡。」——他承認了自己的錯，沒有抱怨。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Now I am sorry. I have had a long time to think."
questions.question: How did the monkey feel about his past?
questions.explanationZh: 「現在我後悔了，我想了很久。」——「後悔了，變了」就是答案。五百年的反省不是假的。
questions.sentenceZh: 「現在我後悔了，我有很長的時間可以想清楚。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knelt down by the rocks and listened with a soft heart.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏跪在石頭旁，靜靜地聽，沒有評判。這樣的心，真的很難得。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel toward the trapped monkey?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 三藏心軟，替他難過——「覺得溫柔，替他難過」就是他的感受。那個 💗 就是他的心。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏對那隻被困住的猴子有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Master, please pull the seal from the top. Only you can free me..."
questions.explanationZh: 「師父，把山頂的封印拿走，只有你能放我自由……」——奶奶說，這句話讓三藏的心跳了一下。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Under the rocks was a small monkey with a brown face and gold eyes.
questions.question: What was surprising about what Sanzang found?
options: a small door leading into the mountain
a pile of gold coins buried under the rock
a living creature trapped beneath the stone
an old letter written in red and gold
optionsZh: 一個活生生的生物被困在石頭下
一封用紅色和金色寫的舊信
questions.explanationZh: 石頭下是一隻活生生的小猴子——「一個活生生的生物被困在石頭下」才是真正的驚喜。
questions.sentenceZh: 石頭下面是一隻棕色臉蛋、金色眼睛的小猴子。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I have been locked here for five hundred years," the monkey said.
questions.questionEn: Had the monkey been free to move around before Sanzang came?
questions.explanationZh: 被鎖在這裡五百年了——他根本不自由，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我在這裡被鎖了五百年，」猴子說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 monkey = 猴子
🔑 locked = 鎖住
🔑 proud = 驕傲
🔑 seal = 封印
石下猴子節的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Long ago, I was loud and proud. The sky god put me here," he added.
questions.question: Why was the monkey punished?
options: breaking the mountain with his tail
stealing food from the Emperor's palace
refusing to speak to the sky god
being too noisy and full of pride
questions.explanationZh: 「loud and proud」——吵鬧又驕傲，才被天神關在這裡，「太吵鬧又充滿驕傲」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「很久以前，我很吵、很驕傲，天神把我關在這裡。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He smiled at Sanzang, but he could not even ___ up.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 「could not + 動詞原形」——「could not sit up」才是正確用法。
questions.sentenceZh: 他對三藏微笑，但他連___起來都做不到。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Now I am sorry. I have had a long time to think."
questions.questionEn: Did the monkey regret his past behaviour?
questions.explanationZh: 「Now I am sorry」——他說了對不起，表明他後悔以前的行為，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 「現在我很後悔，我有很長的時間來反省。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knelt down by the rocks and listened with a soft heart.
questions.question: What does Sanzang's action here show about him?
options: fear that the monkey would trick him
planning to run away quickly after
checking that the rocks were not fake
optionsZh: 對猴子的苦難充滿同情
questions.explanationZh: 跪下、軟心腸傾聽——這是同情心，「對猴子的苦難充滿同情」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏在石頭旁跪下，帶著柔軟的心傾聽。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A monkey had been locked under a mountain for five hundred years. He said sorry.
questions.question: Which best shows the monkey's feeling?
options: 😴 tired and ready to sleep more
questions.explanationZh: 說了「now I am sorry」——「後悔，想要改變」，那個 😔 最像猴子此刻的心情。
questions.sentenceZh: 一隻猴子被困在山下五百年，他說對不起了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 free = 自由的
🔑 protect = 保護
🔑 student = 徒弟
🔑 together = 一起
最後的大時刻來了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang climbed slowly up the side of the huge mountain.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏慢慢爬上那座巨山的側面——一步一步，爬上去，去找那個封印。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: On the very top was a yellow paper with old gold writing.
questions.question: What was at the top of the mountain?
options: a small cup of green tea
a big pile of brown nuts
a bird sleeping in a nest
questions.explanationZh: 山頂有一張黃紙，上面寫著舊舊的金色字——「一張有舊字的紙」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 最頂上有一張黃紙，上面寫著古老的金字。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He held the corner of the paper and pulled it off the rock.
questions.explanationZh: 他抓住紙的一角，從石頭上把它撕下來——那一下，需要多大的勇氣？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Suddenly, the whole mountain shook and bright light came out.
questions.questionEn: Was the seal really powerful?
questions.explanationZh: 山搖了、光亮了——「封印很有力量」，答 Yes。這不是普通的紙。
questions.sentenceZh: 突然間，整座山抖動起來，射出了耀眼的光芒。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The five stone fingers fell away. The monkey jumped up high.
questions.explanationZh: 五根石頭手指碎了，猴子高高跳起來。自由了！五百年，終於自由了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He landed in front of Sanzang and bowed his head all the way down.
questions.question: What did the monkey do first when free?
questions.explanationZh: 他落在三藏面前，低頭鞠躬鞠到底——「鞠躬感謝三藏」就是他做的第一件事。
questions.sentenceZh: 他落在三藏面前，深深地低下了頭。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Master, my name is 孫悟空 (Sun Wukong)," the monkey said.
questions.explanationZh: 「師父，我的名字是孫悟空。」——奶奶說，這個名字，每個中國孩子都知道。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, I will walk with you. I will protect you on the road."
questions.question: What did Wukong promise Sanzang?
options: to keep him safe on the trip
questions.explanationZh: 「從今天起，我跟你走，我保護你。」——「在路上保護他平安」就是悟空的承諾。
questions.sentenceZh: 「從今天起，我陪你走，我在路上保護你。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel about his new student?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 他有了徒弟，不再一個人——「溫暖，不再孤單」就是三藏的感受。那個 🤝 就是他們的連結。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏對這個新徒弟有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Master and student turned to the west and walked on together...
questions.explanationZh: 師父和徒弟一起轉向西方，繼續走……奶奶說，這才是「西遊記」真正要開始的地方。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang climbed slowly up the side of the huge mountain.
questions.question: What was Sanzang doing on the mountain?
options: building a small shelter on the slope
searching for water at the mountain top
running away from the monkey's voice
going up to find and remove the seal
optionsZh: 爬上去找到並取下封印
questions.explanationZh: 三藏爬上山——就是要去找到封印紙、把它拉下來，「爬上去找到並取下封印」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 三藏慢慢爬上了這座巨大的山的側面。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He held the corner of the paper and pulled it off the rock.
questions.questionEn: Was it Sanzang who removed the seal?
questions.explanationZh: 他抓住封印紙角落、把它拉下來——是三藏親自取下封印，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他抓住那張紙的角落，把它從石頭上拉了下來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 climb = 爬
🔑 seal = 封印
🔑 free = 自由
🔑 protect = 保護
悟空獲救節的字！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The five stone fingers fell away. The monkey jumped up high.
questions.question: What happened when the seal was removed?
options: the mountain broke apart and the monkey was free
the mountain grew taller and stronger
Sanzang fell off and the monkey helped
a new seal appeared to replace the old one
optionsZh: 山裂開了，猴子獲得了自由
三藏掉下去，猴子幫了他
一個新封印出現，取代舊的
questions.explanationZh: 石頭手指散落、猴子跳起來——「山裂開了，猴子獲得了自由」就是發生的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 五根石頭手指散落了，猴子高高地跳了起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, I will ___ with you and protect you on the road."
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 「will + 動詞原形」——「will walk」才是正確的未來式用法。
questions.sentenceZh: 「從今天起，我會___著你，在路上保護你。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He landed in front of Sanzang and bowed his head all the way down.
questions.questionEn: Did the monkey show respect to Sanzang after being freed?
questions.explanationZh: 落在三藏面前、深深鞠躬——這是對三藏表示尊敬，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他落在三藏面前，深深低下頭。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Master and student turned to the west and walked on together.
questions.question: What does this ending moment show?
options: both of them returning east to the palace
Sanzang sending the monkey back home
a new friendship beginning on a shared road
the monkey choosing to stay at the mountain
optionsZh: 兩人一起回東邊的皇宮
一段新友誼在共同的道路上開始
questions.explanationZh: 師徒一起往西走——「一段新友誼在共同的道路上開始」就是這個結尾的意義。
questions.sentenceZh: 師父和學生一起轉向西方，繼續前進。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Wukong was free. He bowed to Sanzang and said he would protect him.
questions.question: Which best shows the monkey's heart at this moment?
questions.explanationZh: 鞠躬、說要保護三藏——「感激，準備好服務」，那個 🙏 最像悟空此刻的心情。
questions.sentenceZh: 悟空自由了，他向三藏鞠躬，說他會保護師父。
